text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I am the king. As a first-rate Umamusume, I shall show the world precisely what makes a king a king.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
As such, I bestow upon you the right to support
me! Now, first-rate trainer of mine, follow me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
